name: agents-coding-collab
description: Tool-aware multi-skill coding collaboration plugin with multi-model routing, quick/long-edit mode selection, freshness checks, and Codex final review.

interface.longDescription: Provides a suite of coding-collaboration skills for research, model routing, long-edit context packets, safe script running, and Codex final review. The runner supports OpenAI-compatible APIs with role-specific writer, reviewer, reviser, and validator models, base URLs, and API keys.
defaultPrompt: Use agents-coding-collab for this coding task.
Use agents-coding-model-router to configure multiple models and gateways.
Run a long edit review with fresh docs before delivery.
